Demurrer Filed By Defendant Is Advanced From Dec 24, 2001 To Dec 13, 2001 Per 12/05/01 Ex-Parte Order
Off Calendar Dec-13-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant WALTER A. CRESEY in propria persona demurring party
Siddney Berenstein, Esq. for Plaintiff and opposing party

Mr. Berenstein provided courtesy copies of all papers to the Court. The Court having reviewed the documents and having heard from both parties, overruled the demurrer with 5 days leave to answer. Court finds that the 30-Day Notice is all right. (AJR/sl) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
